live_matches.match_title: Real Kashmir FC vs Namdhari Sports Club - 4 May 2026
live_matches.description: Real Kashmir FC take on Namdhari Sports Club in an exciting Star Cement Indian Football League 2025-26 clash, with both sides aiming to strengthen their position in the standings. Real Kashmir will look to make the most of home conditions, while Namdhari Sports Club aim to maintain their momentum with another strong performance in what promises to be a competitive encounter. Tune in to catch all the action from Star Cement Indian Football League 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
